message:
feat(error_codes): expand error catalog with 8 new structured codes

Add error code definitions covering previously undocumented failure
modes, each with typed causes and actionable recovery steps:

WezTerm errors:
- WA-1021: WezTerm parse error (unexpected output format, version
  mismatch)
- WA-1022: WezTerm command timeout (heavy load, large output)

Storage errors:
- WA-2030: Database corruption detected (unexpected shutdown, disk
  failure, external modification)
- WA-2040: Storage record not found (retention cleanup, invalid ID)

Pattern errors:
- WA-3020: Pattern match timeout (catastrophic backtracking, complex
  regex with nested quantifiers)

Workflow errors:
- WA-5030: Pane locked by another workflow (concurrent workflow
  conflict, stale lock from crash)

Config errors:
- WA-7003: Config parse error (invalid TOML syntax, wrong value types)
- WA-7004: Config serialization failed (internal serialization bug)

All codes are registered in ERROR_CATALOG for runtime lookup by the
structured error reporting system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
